command: bash -lc 'disallowed=$( { git diff --name-only -- .; git diff --cached --name-only -- .; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- .; } | sort -u | grep -Ev "^(internal/backend/acp/acp\.go|internal/backend/acp/acp_test\.go|internal/backend/acp/integration_test\.go|\.heurema/pactum/)" || true); test -z "$disallowed"'
